market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Crypto isn't the problem with the US economy, says senator
articles.description: Louisiana Senator John Kennedy largely dismissed what he called the “promotion” of cryptocurrency by the Digital Chamber CEO Cody Carbone in a Senate hearing on affordability.

articles.title: After betting the firm on Anthropic, Menlo Ventures raises victorious $3B fund
articles.description: Menlo has created a solid rep for itself as an AI investor, all based on one gutsy $750 million move in 2024.

articles.title: Mark Zuckerberg wants Meta to launch its own prediction market
articles.description: The app would be independent of Meta's other social media offerings, although sources told the NYT that those social sites could direct users to engagement with the app.

articles.title: Multi-year Bitcoin holder selling falls to 19-month low as halving model flags new market bottom date
articles.description: OG Bitcoin holders' spending dropped to a 19-month low, as market cycle indicators point to September as a potential market bottom.

articles.title: Zcash miner Fortitude gets Nasdaq listing via HeartSciences merger
articles.description: The all-stock deal gives Fortitude a Nasdaq listing while HeartSciences retains its healthcare business and existing shareholders keep a minority stake.

articles.title: Meta is developing a prediction market app called ‘Arena’ as sector booms: NYT
articles.description: The app would let users forecast future events using a points-based system rather than cash wagers, the report said, citing people familiar with the matter.

articles.title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
articles.description: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.

articles.title: CFTC chair says perp trading not suitable for all assets it regulates
articles.description: Michael Selig told US cotton producers that the agency’s regulatory approach to crypto perpetual futures may not be a “natural fit for traditional commodity markets, like agriculture.”

articles.title: BNY sees 'FOMO' driving asset managers into tokenized funds
articles.description: Fund issuers are exploring blockchain-based ETFs amid fears of missing an early foothold in tokenized finance.

articles.title: CBOE weighs converting BTC, ETH continuous futures into perpetual futures: Report
articles.description: As US regulatory changes accelerate the adoption of crypto perpetual futures and rivals Coinbase and Kalshi expand their offerings, Cboe mulls a product overhaul.

articles.title: Chainlink joins European and Korean bank consortia to develop FX settlement network
articles.description: Banks across Europe and South Korea will study whether regulated euro and won stablecoins can enable real-time cross-border foreign exchange settlement.

articles.title: Chainlink teams up with 47 South Korean, European banks to speed up international money transfers
articles.description: The alliance, called Project Pangea, plans to use stablecoins to settle multimillion-dollar currency trades between Europe and South Korea in near real time.

articles.title: Bitcoin teases $62K breakdown as analysis sees Micron earnings volatility next
articles.description: Bitcoin stayed volatile while bulls tried to preserve support at local lows while stocks prepared for Micron forward earnings and digested Asia losses.

articles.title: HaloBraid raises $7M from Seven Seven Six to end the six-hour hair salon appointment
articles.description: HaloBraid aims to help salons speed up braiding with its first device, slated to launch later this year, that acts as a braiding assistant for professional stylists.

articles.title: 聯電 5 月 EPS 達 0.68 元，較 2025 年同期大增 195.7%
articles.description: 晶圓代工大廠聯電23日發布重大訊息表示，因有價證券於集中交易市場達公布注意交易資訊標準，依據台灣證券交易所通知 […]

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum Foundation will cut budget 40% in major reset
articles.description: The reduction comes on the same day the EF confirmed a 20% reduction in headcount and follows the resignation of co-Executive Director Hsiao-Wei Wang. Her departure brings the total number of senior Ethereum Foundation figures to leave since January to nine, underscoring the scale of the organizatio

articles.title: Bitcoin's recent drop below $60,000 signals Fed, ETF and AI pressures: Deutsche Bank
articles.description: Bitcoin's slump to its lowest level since late 2024 reflects a hawkish Federal Reserve, exchange-traded fund outflows and a shift of capital into AI, the bank said.

articles.title: Bitcoin slump worsens amid SpaceX rout: Can BTC price hold $60K any longer?
articles.description: SpaceX’s $600 billion wipeout rattles tech markets, putting Bitcoin’s $60,000 support at risk as traders brace for a deeper BTC selloff.

articles.title: 兩顆恆星先後爆炸竟是同一起源，天文學界首次確認「雙重超新星」雙星系統
articles.description: 天文學界近日發表了一組極為罕見的天體發現。來自加州史丹佛大學等機構的跨國研究團隊利用 NASA 費米伽瑪射線太 […]
